title: helmiopsis linearifolia subsp. muricata
intro: Helmiopsis linearifolia subsp. muricata, also known as a species of flowering plant in the family Menispermaceae, is native to tropical Africa. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, with its roots and stems having been used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Helmiopsis linearifolia subsp. muricata include its potential to reduce inflammation, act as an antimicrobial agent, and exhibit antioxidant properties. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions for medicinal use, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
